pageTitle: São Miguel Bus | Horários e Rotas de Autocarros na Ilha de São Miguel, Açores
fabShareMarketplaceInviteMessage: Register your business or service here so people can find you on the Hub! {{url}}
feedbackDescriptionPlaceholder: Tell us what happened or what you'd like
feedbackError: Could not open your mail app.
feedbackMailUnavailable: No mail app found. Write to info@sousadev.com.
feedbackMailFallbackNoAttachments: Your draft opened, but screenshots can't be attached this way — please add them manually.
hubSubtitle: Your Azores companion — schedules, weather, news and more.
hubPinHint: Tab bar shortcuts: {{count}}/{{max}}. Tap the pin to add or remove.
hubNavbarFull: Tab bar full — remove a shortcut before adding another.
hubEmpty: No modules available on this island.
hubLandingPageHint: Opens when you launch the app.
bannerSubtitle: Find the best route for you.
offlineBanner: You are offline — cached schedules are available; live search and directions are disabled.
offlineSearchDisabled: No connection — use favorites or previously loaded schedules.
newsEmpty: No articles yet. Pull to refresh after the feed sync runs.
seismicEmpty: No recent events. Pull to refresh after EMSC sync.
seismicMapEmptyHint: Try a longer time range above, or check back after the next EMSC sync.
seismicFeltIntensityOptional: Optional: how strong was it? (1 weak – 12 extreme)
trailsEmpty: No trails yet. Pull to refresh after open-data sync.
trailsAttribution: Official trails — Visit Azores (trails.visitazores.com). Open data — Autonomous Region of the Azores via dados.gov.pt (CC BY 4.0).
trailsAttributionOpenData: Open data — Autonomous Region of the Azores via dados.gov.pt (CC BY 4.0).
noRoutesMessage: No routes found from {{origin}} to {{destination}}. Please try again with different parameters.
noRoutesSubtitle: Try changing your origin or destination, or select a different day.
advertiseSubtitle: Advertise your business for residents and tourists on São Miguel Bus.
advertisingOpportunityDescription: Advertise your business for residents and tourists on São Miguel Bus.
exactTargetingDescription: Show your ad to users searching for routes near your business.
directedInteractionsDescription: Redirect users to your website, social media, or a map with directions to your establishment.
flexiblePricingDescription: Pricing options based on how you want to promote your services.
convenientPaymentDescription: Accepts various payment methods, with a receipt for accounting purposes.
whyAdsButton: Why are there ads in the app?
aboutAdsParagraph1: The São Miguel Bus application was developed by just one person, without any external support or association with companies or entities. Ads play a crucial role:
aboutAdsParagraph2: They help cover the costs of the application's server
aboutAdsParagraph3: They allow the application to remain completely free for all users
supportThankYou: We appreciate your understanding and support in using São Miguel Bus!
aboutAdsListTitle: How ads help São Miguel Bus:
aboutAdsList1: Helps cover the costs of the application's server
aboutAdsList2: Allows the application to remain completely free for all users
aboutAdsList3: Contribute to the ongoing development and improvement of the platform
infoNotDevelopedByBusCompanies: Application Not Developed by Bus Companies
homeInstructionsText: Enter your origin and destination above to search for available routes.
homeInstructionsText2: Click the route button above if you want to get step-by-step directions.
routeInstructionsText: Enter a starting location and destination to get details and step-by-step directions.
routeInstructionsText2: Click the bus button above if you want to search for available bus routes only.
hubModuleWeatherDesc: Weather by parish across the island.
weatherEmptyMessage: Weather is not available yet. Try again later.
loadingToursInfoTitle: Find experiences on São Miguel Island
loadingToursInfoDescription: Please wait while we load information about available experiences.
loadingToursAlternativeLink: If it takes too long to load, you can also access through this link:
toursLoadError: Could not load experiences. Try again later.
infoModalDescription: The São Miguel Bus application was developed by just one person, without any external support or association with companies or entities.
infoModalEnd: The schedules are the entire responsibility of the bus companies.
contactBusCompaniesDescription: For more information, contact the bus companies directly.
aluguerDescription: For more information about bus rental, contact the bus companies directly.
priceAppDescription: The prices of tickets are determined by bus companies and can vary according to distance, ticket type, and other factors. We do not have access to the prices, but we can inform that tickets are sold on the bus itself and must be purchased from the driver with physical money upon entering the bus.
priceAppEnd: For more information, contact the bus companies directly.
confirmationMessage: Please confirm the existence of this route with the bus company before traveling.
confirmBusCompaniesDescription: If you are not sure of the existence of this route, contact the bus companies directly to confirm it.
textAdInfo: You must fill in the content of your ad in the reservation form.
bannerAdInfo: You can send your banner or logo and/or write some text in the reservation form that we will process to create a banner similar to this image.
chatWindowTitle: Chat with the São Miguel Bus AI!
chatWindowMessage: Hello! Is this the first time you're talking to me?
question1: Hello! Is this the first time you're talking to me?
question2: Are you a resident of the island or a tourist?
question3: Do you want me to help you choose a route?
question4: Do you want me to help you plan your trip and guide you during your stay on the island?
question5: Are you willing to pay a small fee for this help?
question6: Thank you for your feedback! At this point, we have no more questions for you.
noMoreQuestions: Thank you for your response! At this point, we have no more questions for you.
alertModalEnd: These alerts were published by bus companies and/or competent entities.
desktopBannerText: This Website is designed to be used on mobile devices. You can use it on your computer, but the experience will be better on your smartphone. Access saomiguelbus.com on the browser of your smartphone!
pricingDescription: Choose your plan to remove all advertisements and enjoy an ad-free experience.
supportDeveloper: Bonus: Support an Azorean Solo Developer. (Yes, this app is not developed by any company, it is just one guy)
alreadySubscribed: I already have a subscription enabled
premiumTerms: By subscribing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
verifySubscriptionDescription: Enter the email address associated with your subscription to activate premium features.
cancelSubscriptionDescription: Manage or cancel your premium subscription
premiumPageDescription: Enjoy an ad-free experience and support the development of São Miguel Bus.
premiumLaunchModalBody: For now, premium features are available to everyone for a short temporary period while we launch the new app.
premiumLaunchModalGrandfather: Current premium subscribers on the website keep their premium status and will be grandfathered on the new app. Price increases will not apply to active subscribers as long as they maintain their subscription.
premiumFeatureBusTracking: Real-time bus tracking and arrival estimates
premiumFeaturePinnedRoutes: Pin favorite routes for daily tracking
premiumDescription: Unlock advanced bus tracking features and enjoy an ad-free experience.
thankYouDescription: You're enjoying an ad-free experience and supporting the development of São Miguel Bus.
supportMessageDescription: Thank you for supporting an independent developer. Your subscription helps keep São Miguel Bus free for everyone and enables continuous improvements.
subscriptionVerified: Subscription verified successfully! Premium features are now active.
subscriptionNotFound: No active subscription found for this email address.
subscriptionExpired: Your subscription has expired. Please renew to continue using premium features.
verificationError: Unable to verify subscription. Please check your email and try again.
networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
premiumDeactivated: Premium features have been deactivated from this device.
invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
noSubscription: No active subscription found for this email. Please subscribe first.
deactivatePremium: Are you sure you want to deactivate premium?
subscriptionDelayWarning: Subscriptions may take up to 24 hours to take effect. If you just subscribed, please try again later.
manageSubscriptionDescription: Update payment method, view invoices, or cancel subscription
thankYouMessage: Thank you for supporting the development of São Miguel Bus. Please enter below the email address you used to subscribe to the Premium plan.
machineTranslationWarning: Languages are machine-translated. Errors may be present.
noAdsExperienceText: Browse experiences without ads - Upgrade now!
interstitialAdDescription: Remove all ads, track your buses in real-time, and pin your favorite routes.
journeyEstimateDescription: This tracks your specific journey only. Times are estimates based on scheduled timetables and may vary due to traffic, weather, or service changes.
journeyTrackingInfo1: This will track only this specific journey until completion or 4 hours maximum.
journeyTrackingInfo2: Departure times are based on the specific time window shown in your directions.
alreadyTrackingJourney: This journey is already being tracked
trackingDisclaimerContent: This feature provides schedule-based estimates, not real-time bus tracking. Times may vary due to traffic, weather, or operational changes. Always verify with bus companies for critical trips.
busTrackingPremiumOnly: Bus tracking is available for premium users only
alreadyTracking: This route is already being tracked
confirmClearAllPinned: Are you sure you want to remove all pinned routes?
confirmRemovePinnedRouteDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this pinned route? This action cannot be undone.
estimateOnlyDescription: The times shown are estimates based on published bus schedules. This is NOT a live GPS tracking system. Actual arrival times may vary due to traffic, weather, or other factors.
trackingInfo1: Times are calculated based on the bus schedule for your selected day.
trackingInfo2: Estimates update based on elapsed time since scheduled departure.
trackingInfo3: For accurate information, contact the bus companies directly.
autoTrackTimeHelp: Tracking will start automatically at this time
autoTrackingFeature: Automatic tracking at your chosen time
stopTrackingMessage: Are you sure you want to stop tracking this route?
busNotStarted: Bus has not started this route yet
stopTrackingConfirmation: Are you sure you want to stop tracking this route?
autoTrackingDescription: This route will be automatically tracked on all days it operates.
smartScheduling: Smart scheduling based on route availability
askForNewFeatures: Ask for new features / changes to the app
marketplaceRegisterCtaTitle: Want to register a business here?
marketplaceRegisterCtaBody: You can register any local business or service on the island — it doesn't have to be yours. Add it directly or share the link with the owner.
marketplaceEmpty: No services in this category yet.
marketplacePendingBadge: Under review — only visible to you until approved.
marketplaceDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this listing?
marketplaceFormPendingNotice: Your listing is reviewed before it appears publicly.
marketplaceFormError: Enter a name and pick a category.
marketplaceFormCategoryNameHint: Our team may refine the name before it goes live.
marketplaceFormBioRequired: Enter a description of your service.
marketplaceFormContactRequired: Provide at least one contact (phone, WhatsApp, or email).
marketplaceFormOwnerContactHint: Private contact for the São Miguel Hub team (not shown on the listing).
marketplaceFormOwnerContactRequired: Provide an owner email or phone number.
marketplaceFormSocialUrlRequired: Each link needs a platform/title and URL.
trafficReportHint: Tap a category to report it instantly.
trafficLocationNeededHint: Choose a spot on the map or enable location for your current position.
trafficPickLocationHint: Tap the map or drag the pin to where the event happened.
trafficMapPickModeHint: Tap the map where the event happened
trafficDraftPinHint: Pin placed — pick a category to report
trafficLocationDenied: Location off — showing all island events.
consentIntro: Choose how the app may use your data. Analytics and ads stay off until you opt in.
notFoundDescription: This screen does not exist in the app.
transitTrackCapMessage: Maximum 5 active tracks. Remove one to continue.
transitInfoCompaniesBody: Contact operators for schedules, tickets, and service changes.
transitInfoCharterBody: For groups or events, contact transport companies directly.
transitInfoDisclaimerBody: Schedules are indicative. Always confirm with the operator. Independent app, not affiliated with bus companies.
hubBarOrderHint: Pinned modules: use the pin and arrows beside the pin to set tab bar shortcuts and their order.
hubGridOrderHint: All modules: use the grid arrows on each tile to reorder the hub layout.
homePrepareTitle: Want to plan something for today?
settingsDsarOffline: Offline — export and delete require a connection.
consentOfflineBanner: Offline — choices are saved locally and sync when back online.
trafficLocationOutOfBounds: Pin must be within the island.
offlineGlobalStale: Offline — saved data may be outdated
offlinePremiumRequired: Offline access is a premium feature
offlineSearchNoCacheBody: Connect once to download schedules for offline use.
settingsPremiumToggleHint: Simulate a premium subscription to test offline access.
premiumOfflinePromptBody: Premium lets you search bus routes offline. Download the schedules now so they're ready without a connection.
authIntro: Sign in to sync your premium and preferences across devices.
authErrorEmailTaken: This email is already registered. Sign in instead.
authErrorInvalidSocialToken: Could not verify your sign-in. Try again.
authErrorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection.
authSignInSubtitle: Access premium and sync your preferences
premiumUpsell: Upgrade to unlock offline schedules and more
premiumRestoreSuccess: Your premium subscription has been restored.
premiumRestoreNone: No previous purchases were found for this account.
premiumPurchaseError: Something went wrong with your purchase. Please try again.
premiumPurchaseNetworkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
premiumPurchaseStoreError: The store is unavailable right now. Please try again later.
premiumPurchaseAlreadyOwned: You already own this subscription. Try restoring purchases.
directionsEmptyBody: Try a different origin, destination or time.
directionsSubtitle: Step-by-step transit directions powered by Google Maps.
newsSubtitle: Latest news and official notices from São Miguel.
trafficEmptyBody: There are currently no traffic reports on the island. Enjoy the clear roads!
appInstallTitle: Get the São Miguel Bus app
appInstallBodyAndroid: Faster, with alerts and offline maps.
appInstallBodyIos: Faster, with alerts and offline maps.
appInstallDesktopBody: Take São Miguel Bus with you on your phone.
